description_long: This sports center is a modern, low-rise complex set within a rectangular landscaped plot bordered by rows of flowering trees. The main building features clean, angular lines and a predominantly white facade, with large glass windows and multiple flat roof sections. The grounds include a central courtyard with a long rectangular pool, flanked by wide walkways and outdoor seating areas. To one side, there is a covered sports court, and on the opposite side, a driveway leads to a sheltered parking area. The landscaping is meticulously arranged, with green lawns and evenly spaced ornamental trees providing a sense of symmetry and order. The overall design emphasizes openness, accessibility, and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, white sports center complex with flat roofs, large windows, landscaped grounds, and a central pool, surrounded by flowering trees and outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central pool, and symmetrical landscaping with flowering trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the driveway, parking area, and the back facade with large windows and a pool.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the covered sports court, extended walkways, and the orderly row of trees along the perimeter.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the sports court, main building, and the full extent of the landscaped grounds and parking.
attribute_entrance_type: One main entrance with double doors, glass panels, and a wide, accessible approach; secondary entrances visible on side and rear.
attribute_roof_structure: Flat roofs with multiple levels, some with overhangs and open terraces; likely constructed from concrete and steel.
attribute_window_arrangement: Large, horizontally aligned windows in grouped and individual arrangements; mostly symmetrical with some floor-to-ceiling sections.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary Modernist with clean lines, flat roofs, extensive glazing, and integrated landscaping.
